name: EMBUDO v2 - PDF Extractor Parser Robusto Final

const src=$('Validate PDF Request').all();const clean=v=>String(v??'').replace(/
/g,'

[ 	]+/g,'

').trim();const pick=j=>typeof j.text==='string'?j.text:typeof j.extractedText==='string'?j.extractedText:typeof j.data==='string'?j.data:JSON.stringify(j,null,2);return $input.all().map((it,i)=>{const s=src[i]?.json||{},e=it.json||{},raw=clean(pick(e)),w=[...(s.warnings||[])];if(raw.length<80)w.push(`${s.fileName||'archivo.pdf'}: texto insuficiente, puede requerir OCR.`);return{json:{...s,extractedTextLength:raw.length,textForAI:raw.slice(0,120000),rawTextPreview:raw.slice(0,6000),extractionMetadata:{info:e.info||{},metadata:e.metadata||{},numpages:e.numpages||null,numrender:e.numrender||null,version:e.version||null},warnings:w}}});
